text: We investigated here the adsorption of different proteins onto nanocapsules in order to get insight into the constitution of both hard and soft protein corona. To this end, we used a dual-methodological approach characterized by the use of either direct or extraction methods to study protein adsorption onto nanocapsules (i) directly in solution, (ii) after extraction from the solution. The rationale behind this methodology is to understand the effect of the extraction step on the final protein corona composition and to get detailed information on the nanosurface behavior at the interface with biological media.
